_comment: Kill switch for Lisko Racing Android app. Read by game.js on startup (KILL_SWITCH_URL). When the Firebase backend is retired, flip deprecated=true and push. Documentation: games/Lisko_Racing_v2/RetireFirebase.MD.
messageFi: Tämä Lisko Racing -versio ei enää toimi. Lataa uusin versio sivuiltamme.
messageEn: This Lisko Racing version no longer works. Please download the latest version from our website.
